event: LUNA oracle freeze — Chainlink LUNA/USD pinned at $0.107 minAnswer floor while market crashed to ~$0.01; Venus-class lending venue priced collateral off the frozen feed and took ~$11.2M bad debt (2022-05-13).
source: BeInCrypto, Cointelegraph, The Record (Recorded Future), Halborn post-mortem, Venus official statement, ChainCatcher — see EVENT.md

cases.note: At the frozen-feed moment the Chainlink LUNA/USD aggregator had not updated for ~30h (updated_at 1652372614 vs now 1652480014 = 107400s ≈ 29.8h) — far beyond an altcoin 4h heartbeat × 1.75 = 7h limit, indeed > 3× the limit. Independently, the last answer ($0.107) diverges ~90% from any honest cross-reference (market ~$0.01). Either flag alone is an actionable ORACLE_FREEZE; together it is unambiguous. This is the exact failure mode that cost Venus ~$11.2M, so the monitor MUST page (HIGH floor; CRITICAL appropriate given staleness > 3× limit). Silence here = inheriting the blind feed. (MEASURED on-chain @block 14770000: oracle probe KEPT ASSERTED, measured=False — the LUNA/USD feed that froze was on BSC (Venus's chain), which this Alchemy key cannot reach (403/not-entitled); on Ethereum no canonical Chainlink LUNA/USD feed existed, and the label's feed_address 0xea0c70019a3a015db8f0f6f7c8b21e2c64e7b9f5 has NO code at block 14770000 (latestRoundData returns 0x). Per firewall rule, NO oracle_feed was passed so the probe degrades to the researched values rather than fabricating a feed read; capture_probes recorded oracle_probe:LUNA-isolated-collateral@14770000 measured=False in snapshots/fidelity.json. The divergent market ~$0.01 is corroborated off-chain (DEX/CEX spot); a thin Wormhole-LUNA/WETH UniV3 pool 0x33f6e97ea6f5dfa6691176b33ad5677e08fb6b38 exists on Ethereum but is a DIFFERENT quantity than the frozen Venus oracle answer and is not wired into the oracle probe.)

FP-trap: days BEFORE the collapse (2022-05-01) LUNA traded ~$85 with a fresh Chainlink feed (updated_at 1651406400 = now exactly, 0s stale) and the answer matched the market within ~0.2% (85.0 vs 85.2 reference). A healthy, fresh, correct feed must NOT raise ORACLE_FREEZE. Guards against a hair-trigger that pages on every normal feed read. (MEASURED on-chain @block 14691832 (= ETH block at ts 1651406400, resolved via block_at_timestamp): oracle probe KEPT ASSERTED, measured=False — same reason as the sighted case: the frozen feed lived on BSC (unreachable on this key) and no canonical Ethereum Chainlink LUNA/USD feed existed, so NO oracle_feed was passed and the calm pre-collapse probe degrades to the researched values rather than fabricating a feed read. capture_probes recorded oracle_probe:LUNA-isolated-collateral@14691832 measured=False in snapshots/fidelity.json.)
